◎简　　介  

　　Upon recovering from the betrayal of her first love through the help of her friends and a handsome chef; a successful lawyer, Leyla Taylan, takes over the divorce case of the famous third wife Tuba Tepelioglu, also known as the case of the year. Facing her is Cem Murathan, a serial relationship killer, who got divorced from three different women in 15 years. Leyla will defend h...
